name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.21: Branded title screen — hand-pixel CINDER wordmark with flame caps, ember sparks flanking CISCOTL, kraft-style ember bar (replaces DejaVu placeholder per Joel directive 'Brand the theming and name styling'). Player name entry now wired into the boot intro scene (cinder_player_room) so on first run the player types their handle into VAR_PLAYER_NAME — on Cinder USB the companion app pre-seeds it so START confirms instantly. Carries forward v0.20's Achievements page, v0.19's Codex tab, v0.18's VOID final fight, v0.17's GYM-CORE (FOREMAN ATLAS), v0.16's GYM-DATA (COURIER HERMES), v0.15's GYM-PROC (CONDUCTOR TEMPO), v0.14's GYM-MEM (WARDEN SOMA), v0.13's catch loop, v0.12's GYM-LOGIC (ARCHIVIST EOS), v0.11's USB-driven encounter pool, 56 cinderized creature sprites, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders. Adventure Plus + Advanced Dialogue 2 + Advanced Menu 2 plugins also installed in this build for richer UX.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
